  "version": "0.2.0",
  "configurations": [
    {
      "name": "Launch API (.NET)",
      "type": "coreclr",
      "request": "launch",
      //"preLaunchTask": "build",
      "program": "${project}/API/bin/Debug/net10.0/API.dll",
      "cwd": "${project}/API",
      "stopAtEntry": false,
      "console": "internalConsole",
      "env": {
        "ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT": "Development"
      },
      "serverReadyAction": {
        "pattern": "Now listening on: (https?://\\S+)",
        "uriFormat": "%s",
        "action": "openExternally"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "Serve Angular (npm start)",
      "type": "node",
      "request": "launch",
      "cwd": "${project}/client",
      "runtimeExecutable": "npm",
      "runtimeArgs": ["run", "start"],
      "console": "integratedTerminal",
      "internalConsoleOptions": "neverOpen"
    },
    {
      "name": "Launch Browser (Angular)",
      "type": "chrome",
      "request": "launch",
      "url": "http://localhost:4200",
      "webRoot": "${project}/client/src"
    }
  ],
  "compounds": [
    {
      "name": "Launch API + Angular",
      "configurations": [
        "Launch API (.NET)",
        "Launch Browser (Angular)"

    }
